Describe the sequence of actions involving the bread and the child in the kitchen.
canonical_answer: At 6s, hands slice brown bread and spread butter on a white board; at 10s, a child with a pink bow holds a piece of bread over a bowl; at 12s, the child holds two pieces of bread while standing near wooden cabinets.

question: Describe the visual changes regarding the ingredients and title presentation throughout the clip.
canonical_answer: At 6s, green zucchinis sit next to sliced bread on a cutting board; at 14s, a title card appears with a child in a tie pointing up; at 18s, the child returns with zucchinis stacked on a wooden table under text.
